title: Fluree — Enterprise AI Data Platform
excerpt: Fluree turns raw data into trusted, queryable knowledge graphs. GraphRAG-powered accuracy for enterprise AI.
content_html:
The Unified
Intelligence
Platform

Throw everything at Fluree.
We connect the dots automatically,
and give your AI a place it can actually trust.

Trusted by

Selected Case Studies

USE CASE Financial Services

10,000+

documents extracted

A financial services leader used Fluree to automate tagging, improve discovery, and grow a data portal into a more trusted intelligence destination.

Read the Case Study

capabilities

One place for your data and context — infinite interfaces on top.

Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama — any MCP-speaking agent reasons over the same graph. No tools yet?
Run on Fluree AI, built in.

Every question, answer, and action that flows through the system
compounds into shared context making your entire organization more knowledgeable over time.

Throw everything at Fluree.

and give your AI a place it can actually trust.

sentences.en: Throw everything at Fluree.We connect the dots automatically,and give your AI a place it can actually trust.
sentences.zh: 把一切都扔到 Fluree 上。我们自动连接这些点，并为您的 AI 提供一个真正可以信任的地方。

blocks.html_en: A financial services leader used Fluree to automate tagging, improve discovery, and grow a data portal into a more trusted intelligence destination.

sentences.en: A financial services leader used Fluree to automate tagging, improve discovery, and grow a data portal into a more trusted intelligence destination.
sentences.zh: 一家金融服务领导者使用 Fluree 来自动标记、改进发现并将数据门户发展成为更值得信赖的情报目的地。

blocks.html_en: One place for your data and context — infinite interfaces on top.

sentences.en: One place for your data and context — infinite interfaces on top.
sentences.zh: 您的数据和上下文放在一处 — 顶部有无限的接口。

Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama — any MCP-speaking agent reasons over the same graph. No tools yet?

sentences.en: Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama — any MCP-speaking agent reasons over the same graph.
sentences.zh: Claude、OpenAI、Gemini、Ollama — 任何讲 MCP 的代理都会在同一张图表上进行推理。

sentences.en: No tools yet?Run on Fluree AI, built in.
sentences.zh: 还没有工具？在内置的 Fluree AI 上运行。

Every question, answer, and action that flows through the system
compounds into shared context making your entire organization more knowledgeable over time.

sentences.en: Every question, answer, and action that flows through the systemcompounds into shared context making your entire organization more knowledgeable over time.
sentences.zh: 流经系统的每个问题、答案和操作都会融入共享上下文，使您的整个组织随着时间的推移变得更加了解。

blocks.html_en: AI and workflows built in silos — duplicated, costly, and disconnected.

sentences.zh: 人工智能和工作流程建立在孤岛中——重复、成本高昂且互不相关。

blocks.html_en: Future-proof and pluggable — your graph gets sharper with every new source, human, and agent you add.

sentences.en: Future-proof and pluggable — your graph gets sharper with every new source, human, and agent you add.
